nasb.text: When you are sowing the eighth year, you can still eat old things from the crop, eating the old until the ninth year when its crop comes in.

esv.text: When you sow in the eighth year, you will be eating some of the old crop; you shall eat the old until the ninth year, when its crop arrives.

cnv.text: 第八年你們耕種時，仍有舊糧吃；直到第九年，收成新糧的時候，你還有舊糧可吃。

ccb.text: 第八年开始耕种时，你们仍会吃陈粮，一直吃到第九年的收割季节。
